contactInfo.title: Mōhiohio Whakapā
contactInfo.headsUpMessage: Ahakoa he mea whiwhiwhi tēnei mōhiohio, mā te tuku (mōhiohio tika) e āwhina ai ngā kōrero ā ka heke tō Kaute Tuarā % e tuku tere ake ai ō uru ki ētahi wāhanga o te pae (pēnei i te kore whakamana i tētahi kāri nama).
